word: G272 - ἀμελέω - ameléō - am-el-eh'-o - Make light of

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀμελέω

- Transliteration: ameleo

- Phonetic: am-el-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to be careless of, to neglect

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and G3199

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and G3199; to be careless of: - make light of neglect be negligent not regard.
